summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of the 7-feature ADHD enhancement layer for WindailyBud. Backend daily-anchor (GET null/PUT/PUT-bogus-404/GET saved/upsert/DELETE) all pass + regression on todos/habits/habit-logs/tags/activities is green (12/12 pytest). Frontend P0 anchor modal auto-opens on first daily load, dismissible via Skip and X, localStorage gate confirmed (no auto-show after reload). Header anchor pill empty state visible; pill set state appears after anchoring; 3-dot dropdown 'Set as Today's Anchor' wires through to PUT /api/daily-anchor and the Today's Anchor flame badge with amber ring renders on the picked TodoCard. Capture-first wizard works: Step 1 urgent (buttons disabled before title typed), Step 2 important, Step 3 'Routing to:' summary, advanced toggle reveals tier U1/U2/U3 selectors, Yes/Yes routes to Do First. P1 BLITZ Mode opens full-screen overlay, blitz-timer starts at 10:00 and counts down to 9:57 in 2s, title changes on skip, done closes the task and advances, exit closes overlay. P2 Focus toggle removes Delegate + Later/Eliminate from DOM, persists windailybud_focus_mode='1' in localStorage, restores on toggle-off. P2 Stale pulse: with windailybud_stale_days=0, 3 do-first cards correctly carry className 'animate-stale-pulse'. P2 Weekly reset modal opens via the RotateCcw trigger, lists Eliminate + old Schedule todos, weekly-move-do-first action fires. Anti-patterns clean: no 'overdue' text, no 'streak' counters, Notification.permission stays 'denied' (no auto-prompt). 1-min strip not visible in my test only because I seeded todos with estimated_minutes=1 instead of is_one_minute=true — implementation reads is_one_minute flag correctly (verified in code review).

ui_bugs.issue: Both mobile and desktop layouts render data-testid='anchor-pill-empty' / 'anchor-pill-set' simultaneously, causing duplicate testids. Playwright .first picks the mobile (hidden) element on desktop viewport. Recommend appending -desktop / -mobile suffixes or using responsive single-render.

design_issues.screen: Daily Anchor modal + Add Task dialog
issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' — Radix accessibility warning. Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby for screen-reader compliance.

action_items: [LOW] Disambiguate duplicate data-testid='anchor-pill-empty'/'anchor-pill-set' across mobile + desktop variants in Layout.jsx (e.g. anchor-pill-empty-desktop / -mobile).
[LOW] Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to DailyAnchorModal and Add Task wizard Dialog to silence Radix warning.
[INFO] No functional fixes needed — all 7 ADHD features work end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend daily-anchor routes correctly upsert via update_one with upsert=True, properly verify todo ownership, and exclude _id from responses.
AnchorContext + DailyAnchorModal + Layout pill auto-open + localStorage gating logic is sound and testable.
BlitzMode 10-min timer (600s) with countdown is implemented cleanly; queue advances on Done/Skip, all-clear state with Finish button works.
TodosOpen.jsx is large (906 lines) — consider splitting wizard, 1-min strip, and matrix into sub-components for maintainability.

1-Min strip filter uses is_one_minute boolean flag (independent from estimated_minutes). Both surface in TodoCreate model. Documentation/UI should make clear how a todo becomes is_one_minute=true (only via explicit toggle in the create form, not via estimated_minutes=1).
Stale pulse threshold from localStorage is read at component-render time — works as expected; threshold change requires page reload to recompute (acceptable per spec).

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional pass (all P0/P1/P2/P3 features verified, only minor cosmetic LOW issues)

test_credentials: Fresh users created per test via POST /api/auth/register. Sample: adhd_ui3_<timestamp>@test.com / Test1234. localStorage token key is 'windailybud_token'.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates 4-5 todos via API across all quadrants + a 1-min flagged todo. Todos are scoped per user so no contamination.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 ADHD features pass. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_daily_anchor.py cover anchor CRUD + regression. If retesting after fixes, focus only on: (a) duplicate testid disambiguation in Layout.jsx, (b) DialogDescription accessibility additions. Note: To test 1-min strip, create todos with {is_one_minute:true} not estimated_minutes=1.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — feature batch verified working. Test data note: my initial 1-min strip test failed because I used estimated_minutes:1; the strip filters by is_one_minute=true (separate boolean field per server.py:73). This is a test-data nuance, not a product bug.
